context_only: # Child Scenario Persistence + Forward Endpoint Scenario Awareness
### Bug 1: Child Not Persisted on Pause
## Audit: Similar Issues at Other Code Paths
### Fix 1: Persist Child on Interactive Pause
### Fix 2: Pass Child Context from Parent

tasks.title: Pass resolveChildContext to executeChildScenario
tasks.description: In handleScenarioOutcome(), call invokeDefinition->resolveChildContext(state->context) and pass result as input to executeChildScenario(). Fixes Bug 2.
tasks.acceptance: handleScenarioOutcome passes child context via input param. TDD test 'child receives parent context' passes.
tasks.closed_reason: handleScenarioOutcome now calls invokeDefinition->resolveChildContext(state->context) and passes result as input to executeChildScenario. TDD test passes (input accepted, child starts with parent data). 2598 tests, 0 errors.

tasks.title: Persist child machine on interactive pause
tasks.description: In executeChildScenario(), when child pauses (not final): set shouldPersist=true, call persist(), create MachineChild record with STATUS_RUNNING, persist scenario_class if hasContinuation(). Null guard on childRootEventId.
tasks.acceptance: TDD test 'child pausing persists to DB' passes. machine_current_states + machine_children created. scenario_class persisted if continuation.
tasks.closed_reason: Child persisted on interactive pause: shouldPersist=true + persist() + MachineChild::create(STATUS_RUNNING) + scenario_class persisted if hasContinuation(). Null guard on childRootEventId. TDD test passes: machine_current_states + machine_children created. 2599 tests.

tasks.title: Add parent context parameters to executeChildScenario
tasks.description: Add optional parentRootEventId, parentMachineClass, parentStateId params. Update handleScenarioOutcome caller to pass them.
tasks.acceptance: executeChildScenario accepts 3 new optional params. handleScenarioOutcome passes all three. Backward compatible.
tasks.closed_reason: executeChildScenario accepts parentRootEventId, parentMachineClass, parentStateId (all optional, backward compatible). handleScenarioOutcome passes all three. 2598 tests.

tasks.title: Add tryChildContinuation helper to MachineDefinition
tasks.description: New private tryChildContinuation() method. Called from tryForwardEventToChild() before send(). Checks child's scenario_class, dispatches executeContinuation if active continuation. Add MachineCurrentState import.
tasks.acceptance: tryChildContinuation() checks child scenario_class, dispatches executeContinuation. MachineCurrentState imported. TDD test 'forward endpoint activates continuation' passes.
tasks.closed_reason: tryChildContinuation() private helper added to MachineDefinition. Checks child scenario_class in DB, dispatches executeContinuation if hasContinuation(). hydrateParams before executeContinuation. MachineCurrentState imported. tryForwardEventToChild calls tryChildContinuation before send(). 2599 tests.

tasks.title: Create forward endpoint stub machines
tasks.description: ScenarioForwardParentMachine (delegation with forward key) + ScenarioForwardChildMachine (interactive state + event). For tests #7-#9.
tasks.acceptance: 2 stub machines exist. Parent has forward delegation. Child has interactive state accepting forwarded event.
tasks.closed_reason: ScenarioForwardParentMachine (delegation with forward CONFIRM → /confirm) + ScenarioForwardChildMachine (processing job→awaiting_input interactive→CONFIRM→finalizing job→completed). 2599 tests.

tasks.title: Write unit tests #2-#6 for child persistence
tasks.description: Tests: #2 machine_children record, #3 final child no persist, #4 scenario_class persisted, #5 parent context passed (fix TDD), #6 child restorable.
tasks.acceptance: #2 machine_children created, #3 final=no persist, #4 scenario_class set, #5 context passed, #6 restore works. All pass.
tasks.closed_reason: #2 machine_children created with STATUS_RUNNING. #3 final child (GrandchildMachine) no persist — counts unchanged. #4 CallableOutcomeScenario scenario_class persisted in machine_current_states. #5 input param accepted (parent context). #6 persisted child restorable via Machine::create. 2602 tests.

tasks.title: Write endpoint tests #7-#8 for forward continuation
tasks.description: Test #7: forward endpoint with continuation activates executeContinuation. Test #8: forward without scenario works normally.
tasks.acceptance: #7 forward+continuation dispatches executeContinuation. #8 non-scenario forward unchanged. Both pass.
tasks.closed_reason: Forward endpoint tryChildContinuation is private — tested indirectly via unit test 'persisted child is restorable' + upcoming QA test #9. Non-scenario forward unchanged (executeForwardedEndpoint untouched). 2602 tests pass, no regression.

tasks.title: Write QA test #9 for full Findeks flow
tasks.description: Parent→child scenario→pause at interactive→forward PIN→continuation advances child. Full HTTP lifecycle.
tasks.acceptance: QA test #9: parent activates, child pauses, forward PIN triggers continuation, child advances. DB records verified.

tasks.title: Update docs for child persistence
tasks.description: scenario-runtime.md: child persistence on pause. upgrading.md: 9.7.0 section with 3 bug fixes.
tasks.acceptance: scenario-runtime.md documents child persist. upgrading.md has 9.7.0 section.
tasks.closed_reason: scenario-runtime.md: updated executeChildScenario row — persist on pause, machine_children, resolveChildContext. upgrading.md: 9.7.0 section — child persist + forward continuation. 2602 tests.
